vocab.meaning: một kho tàng thông tin/kiến thức
vocab.example: Educational websites in Vietnam have become a mine of information for students looking to self-study during the weekends.

vocab.meaning: khía cạnh quan trọng nhất/bản chất của vấn đề
vocab.example: For e-commerce sites like Shopee, convenience is the name of the game, which is why they are so popular nationwide.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ thịnh hành/đang là mốt
vocab.example: Currently, short-video platforms are all the rage among the younger generation in my country.

vocab.meaning: rất tốn kém (thường nói về phí đăng ký/mua sắm)
vocab.example: While premium streaming sites can cost a pretty penny, many Vietnamese people are still willing to pay for high-quality content.

vocab.meaning: lan truyền nhanh chóng (trở nên cực kỳ phổ biến trên mạng)
vocab.example: Social media sites are the primary places where news can go viral in a matter of seconds across the country.

vocab.meaning: lan nhanh như cháy rừng (thường nói về tin tức)
vocab.example: On local forum websites, rumors and celebrity gossip often spread like wildfire.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ mọi nhu cầu/sở thích (dù là nhỏ nhất)
vocab.example: Giant retail websites in Vietnam seem to cater to every whim of the consumers, from groceries to high-end electronics.

vocab.meaning: cửa sổ nhìn ra thế giới (cách để tìm hiểu về thế giới bên ngoài)
vocab.example: For many people in rural areas, international news sites are their main window on the world.

vocab.meaning: Fintech and digital wallet websites have taken the Vietnamese market by storm over the last couple of years.
giữ vững tinh thần (liên hệ tới các trang web tư vấn tâm lý/động lực)
vocab.example: Mental health blogs have become popular recently, helping people to keep their chin up during stressful times.
